description: This source file is a Flutter application main entry point that sets up the main widget, theme, and home page. It defines the main app widget, a home page with a scaffold, app bar, and centered content showing a loading message and a progress indicator.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: The root widget of the application, setting theme and home page.

classes.name: MyHomePage
classes.description: A stateful widget representing the main screen with a title.

classes.name: _MyHomePageState
classes.description: State class managing the build method for MyHomePage, rendering the UI with Scaffold and content.

methods.name: main
methods.description: The application's entry point that initializes the app by calling runApp with MyApp.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the UI for MyApp and _MyHomePageState, creating MaterialApp and Scaffold respectively.

methods.name: createState
methods.description: Creates the mutable state for MyHomePage widget.
